name: Tomato Egg Drop Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup canned tomatoes (or 2 medium fresh tomatoes, peeled and seeded)
1 tablespoon Finely chopped scallions (white part only)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the chicken stock into a pot and bring to a simmer.
2. If using fresh tomatoes, peel, seed, and cut them into 1-inch cubes. If using canned tomatoes, chop them into small chunks.
3. In a separate bowl, lightly beat the eggs and mix with sesame oil.
4. Add the light soy sauce and salt to the simmering stock, stirring well to combine.
5. Gradually add the chopped tomatoes to the pot, stirring continuously.
6. Simmer for 5 minutes.
7. Stir in the finely chopped scallions.
8. Slowly pour the egg mixture into the soup in a thin stream, using a chopstick or fork to gently pull it through, forming strands (stirring in a "figure 8" motion works well).
9. Garnish with the chopped scallion tops before serving.
